languages.text: Меч Себериана во временной петле оказался хрупкой подделкой, а не драгоценным артефактом.

traits.locale_text: Меч Себериана во временной петле оказался хрупкой подделкой, а не драгоценным артефактом.

languages.text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.
languages.original_text: Меч Себериана во временной петле оказался хрупкой подделкой, а не драгоценным артефактом.

traits.locale_text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.
Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.
Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.
Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.

languages.text: Seberians Schwert erwies sich in der Zeitschleife als brüchige Fälschung und war nicht das wertvolle Artefakt, das es zu sein schien.
languages.original_text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.

traits.locale_text: Seberians Schwert erwies sich in der Zeitschleife als brüchige Fälschung und war nicht das wertvolle Artefakt, das es zu sein schien.

languages.text: L'épée de Seberian qui se trouve dans la boucle temporelle s'est avérée une contrefaçon fragile et non le précieux artefact auquel elle ressemble.
languages.original_text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.

traits.locale_text: L'épée de Seberian qui se trouve dans la boucle temporelle s'est avérée une contrefaçon fragile et non le précieux artefact auquel elle ressemble.

languages.text: 事实证明，时间循环里的塞贝里安之剑不过是个脆弱的赝品，而不像表面看起来那样是件珍贵圣物。
languages.original_text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.

traits.locale_text: 事实证明，时间循环里的塞贝里安之剑不过是个脆弱的赝品，而不像表面看起来那样是件珍贵圣物。

languages.text: La espada de Seberian que existía dentro del bucle temporal resultó ser una frágil falsificación, y no el valioso artefacto que parecía.
languages.original_text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.

traits.locale_text: La espada de Seberian que existía dentro del bucle temporal resultó ser una frágil falsificación, y no el valioso artefacto que parecía.

languages.text: タイムループの中のセベリアの剣は、貴重な工芸品ではなく、薄っぺらな偽物であることが判明した。
languages.original_text: The Seberian sword in the time loop turned out to be a flimsy fake, not a precious artefact.

languages.text: Seberian'ın zaman döngüsü içindeki kılıcının kırılgan bir taklit olduğu, göründüğü gibi değerli bir eser olmadığı ortaya çıktı.
languages.original_text: Seberian's sword within the temporal loop proved to be a brittle counterfeit, not the precious artefact it appeared to be.

traits.locale_text: Seberian'ın zaman döngüsü içindeki kılıcının kırılgan bir taklit olduğu, göründüğü gibi değerli bir eser olmadığı ortaya çıktı.
